message:
feat(fp-io): SqlInspector::reflect_all_views (br-zuqt / fd90.54)

View-side parity with fd90.53's reflect_all_tables. Iterates
list_views(schema) and calls reflect_table on each view name —
PRAGMA table_info works on views too, returning the view's column
shape. Same disappearing-entity skip semantics as
reflect_all_tables.

Views don't carry constraints, so PK / FK / UC / index lists in
the bundle will typically be empty for view reflections — only
the column metadata + comment are meaningful.

3 new tests cover: empty DB returns empty vec, populated SQLite DB
returns one bundle per view (NOT mixing in tables), multi-schema
PG-like backend stub correctly propagates the schema arg through
list_views and table_schema.

429 fp-io tests pass under default features (was 426); 246 under
--no-default-features (was 245); clippy -D warnings clean both
profiles; ubs Critical=0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
